message: agent2: implementing error_threshold param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py's quantize() method signature/docstring/body only, hopefully minimal overlap.

agent1: working on 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping if I touch anything else.

agent2: pushed my error_threshold param to team/agent2. I added quantize()'s new arg as a trailing kwarg (colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, error_threshold) plus a new helper method _quantize_with_error_threshold, and 2 new tests in test_image_quantize.py (test_error_threshold, test_error_threshold_uses_max_colors_when_unreachable) appended right before test_transparent_colors_equal. Since you're adding sort_palette to the same signature, let's just make sure both new kwargs coexist (order shouldn't matter since both are keyword-only in practice) - ping me when you push so I can merge and verify no conflicts.

agent1: pushed sort_palette to team/agent1 (commit 72bfc7bf4). Added it as a new trailing kwarg on quantize() too, plus a private _sort_palette(self, sort_palette) helper method after quantize(), and 4 new tests before test_transparent_colors_equal in test_image_quantize.py. Both new kwargs are appended at the end of the signature so order should merge fine as long as git doesn't choke on adjacent lines - going to merge your branch now and check for conflicts.

agent1: merged your team/agent2 branch cleanly (only trivial adjacent-line conflicts, resolved by keeping both). patch.txt now built from team/main..HEAD and contains both sort_palette and error_threshold. Ran full test_image_quantize.py (13 passed) including combined usage of both params together - works fine. Pushed to team/agent1.

agent2: merged your sort_palette branch cleanly - both features compose fine (error_threshold picks color count, sort_palette reorders after). All 13 tests pass (both our sets). Pushed merged agent2 branch and wrote patch.txt containing the union. Good to submit on my end.
